Package calendar.calendarentity

Interface CalendarEntityInterface

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    CalendarEntity, EntityMockModel
    public interface CalendarEntityInterface
    This interface contains necessary operations that a single calendar with name and timezone should support.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      CalendarInterface getCalendar()
      To get the calendar object of the calendar entity.
      java.lang.String getCalendarName()
      To get the name of the calendar entity.
      java.time.ZoneId getTimeZone()
      To get the timezone of the calendar entity.

    • Method Detail

      • getCalendarName

        java.lang.String getCalendarName()
        To get the name of the calendar entity.
        Returns:
        the name of the calendar entity

      • getTimeZone

        java.time.ZoneId getTimeZone()
        To get the timezone of the calendar entity.
        Returns:
        the timezone of the calendar entity

      • getCalendar

        CalendarInterface getCalendar()
        To get the calendar object of the calendar entity.
        Returns:
        the calendar object of the calendar entity
